_comment: Daily Pull — Tarot (#8 in marketing/BreakingBricksNews/docs/alternative_setups.md). The FIRST 'Randomized (seeded)' show: each episode draws a 3-card Past/Present/Future spread from the 22 Major Arcana with a date-seeded RNG in compute.js, then dramatizes it via `claude -p`. Config + 23-member recurring cast ONLY (The Reader host + all 22 Major Arcana, so every drawable card has a stable portrait, per-card accent colour and voice — allowNewCharacters=false because the entire draw pool pre-exists); no rendered assets (those generate per episode). Import: POST /workflow/import-campaign { userId, importData: <this file> }, or just run marketing/showrunner/setup_show.sh which imports it, generates the 23 cast portraits, composes the soundtrack, and writes CAMPAIGN_ID into show.env. Style resolves by label ('Digital Painting'); the art-nouveau / Mucha art direction lives in movies[0].style (appended to every image prompt). Card meanings + imagery are public domain (A.E. Waite, Pictorial Key to the Tarot, 1911; Rider–Waite–Smith deck, 1909). animationType 'kenburns' = candle-lit drift (interim look while Kling AI is in progress). The single movie is a season=null/episode=null TEMPLATE: copyCastFromSource clones this roster into each generated episode.
message: Hand-authored Daily Pull cast/config template (no rendered assets)

campaigns.name: Daily Pull — Tarot
campaigns.prompt: A daily tarot show: The Reader, a mystic host, draws a 3-card Past/Present/Future spread from the 22 Major Arcana and reads it; each drawn card appears as its own personified figure. Five scenes, ending on a one-line takeaway caption card.

style.label: Digital Painting
style.description: Hand-painted aesthetic with visible brushstrokes, artistic color palettes, and painterly textures.

movies.title: Daily Pull
movies.plot: Recurring cast template for Daily Pull. Holds The Reader (mystic host; opens + closes every episode) and all 22 Major Arcana as personified recurring characters; each episode clones this roster and draws three of the cards.
movies.style: ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Reader
customCast.description: The Reader: a warm, uncanny mystic host at a candle-lit table draped in dark velvet, a deck fanned before her, an ornate art-nouveau headscarf and amber jewellery, soft candlelight on her knowing face, inviting and serene. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Fool
customCast.description: The Fool (Major Arcana 0), personified: a bright-eyed young wanderer in patchwork motley with a knapsack on a stick and a small white dog at the heel, stepping weightlessly toward a cliff edge under a white sun. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Magician
customCast.description: The Magician (Major Arcana 1), personified: a poised figure in white and red robes, one hand raised to the sky and one to the earth, an infinity sign above the brow, the four suit-symbols on the table, roses and lilies around. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The High Priestess
customCast.description: The High Priestess (Major Arcana 2), personified: a serene veiled woman seated between a black pillar and a white pillar, a crescent moon at her feet and a scroll of hidden law on her lap, calm and unreadable. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Empress
customCast.description: The Empress (Major Arcana 3), personified: a radiant crowned mother on a cushioned throne in a field of golden wheat, a heart-shaped shield at her side, forest and waterfall behind, generous and warm. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Emperor
customCast.description: The Emperor (Major Arcana 4), personified: a stern bearded ruler on a stone throne carved with rams' heads, armour beneath the robe, an ankh sceptre in hand, barren red mountains behind, immovable. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Hierophant
customCast.description: The Hierophant (Major Arcana 5), personified: a robed high priest between two stone pillars raising a hand in blessing, a triple crown and crossed keys at his feet, two acolytes kneeling before him. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Lovers
customCast.description: The Lovers (Major Arcana 6), personified: a man and a woman beneath a radiant winged angel, a tree of flame behind one and a fruited tree behind the other, a mountain between them, sunlit and open. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Chariot
customCast.description: The Chariot (Major Arcana 7), personified: an armoured charioteer crowned with stars under a starry canopy, a black sphinx and a white sphinx yoked before the car, a walled city behind, driven and resolute. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: Strength
customCast.description: Strength (Major Arcana 8), personified: a calm woman in a white gown garlanded with flowers gently closing the jaws of a great tawny lion with bare hands, an infinity sign over her head, serene. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Hermit
customCast.description: The Hermit (Major Arcana 9), personified: a grey-robed elder alone on a snowy peak, a lantern holding a single six-pointed star raised before him, a staff in the other hand, contemplative and still. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: Wheel of Fortune
customCast.description: Wheel of Fortune (Major Arcana 10), personified: a great golden wheel inscribed with mystic letters turning in the clouds, a sphinx above, a serpent descending, a jackal-headed figure rising, four winged beasts reading in the corners. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: Justice
customCast.description: Justice (Major Arcana 11), personified: a crowned figure enthroned between two pillars, an upraised double-edged sword in one hand and balanced scales in the other, level-eyed and impartial. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Hanged Man
customCast.description: The Hanged Man (Major Arcana 12), personified: a man suspended serenely by one ankle from a living T-shaped tree, hands behind his back, a radiant halo about his head, at peace in the reversal. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: Death
customCast.description: Death (Major Arcana 13), personified: a skeletal rider in black armour on a pale white horse, a black banner bearing a white rose, a fallen king before him, a sun rising between two towers on the horizon. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: Temperance
customCast.description: Temperance (Major Arcana 14), personified: a winged angel with one foot on land and one in a stream, pouring water endlessly between two golden cups, a path to a crowned mountain behind, calm and exact. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Devil
customCast.description: The Devil (Major Arcana 15), personified: a horned half-goat figure on a black pedestal, a torch held downward, two loosely chained human figures below who could lift the chains off at any moment, low red glow. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Tower
customCast.description: The Tower (Major Arcana 16), personified: a tall stone tower struck by a bolt of lightning, its golden crown blasted off, flames in the windows, two figures falling headlong against a black sky. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Star
customCast.description: The Star (Major Arcana 17), personified: a kneeling figure by a still pool under one great eight-pointed star and seven smaller ones, pouring water from two jugs onto land and water, a bird in a tree behind, tranquil. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Moon
customCast.description: The Moon (Major Arcana 18), personified: a pale full moon dripping light over a winding path between two towers, a dog and a wolf baying upward, a crayfish crawling from the water, silver-blue and uncertain. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The Sun
customCast.description: The Sun (Major Arcana 19), personified: a radiant child crowned with a sunflower riding a white horse before a wall of tall sunflowers, a great beaming sun overhead, a red banner streaming, pure and bright. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: Judgement
customCast.description: Judgement (Major Arcana 20), personified: a great angel sounding a trumpet from the clouds, pale figures rising with arms uplifted from open graves below, a cross banner, snow-capped mountains behind, awe-struck. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.

customCast.name: The World
customCast.description: The World (Major Arcana 21), personified: a dancing figure draped in a violet sash within a great laurel wreath, a wand in each hand, the four winged beasts in the corners, cosmic and triumphant. ornate French art-nouveau tarot-card illustration in the spirit of Alphonse Mucha: a single figure framed by a decorative arched border of curling vines, stars and geometric ornament, flat gilded gold-leaf background, jewel-toned flowing line-work, candle-lit warm glow, elegant and luminous.
